data.title: Changpeng Zhao’s X post sends BNB Chain test memecoin soaring 10,000%
data.description:
A test memecoin (TST) built on BNB Chain saw an explosive 10,000% surge after a social media post by former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao. According to data from Four.meme, TST’s value briefly spiked to $0.0488 following Zhao’s post before dropping to $0.0085 at press time. The token reached a market cap of $52 million at […]
The post Changpeng Zhao’s X post sends BNB Chain test memecoin soaring...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/changpeng-zhaos-x-post-sends-bnb-chain-test-memecoin-soaring-10000/

data.title: Honeywell Shares Drop Over 5% After Corporate Split Announcement
data.description:
Honeywell plans to split into three publicly traded companies to enhance shareholder value, driven by Elliott Management's influence.
The post Honeywell Shares Drop Over 5% After Corporate Split Announcement appeared first on Tokenist.

data.title: Tornado Cash Developer Alexey Pertsev Leaving Prison on Supervised Release
data.description:
Alexey Pertsev will be released from prison with an electronic monitor as he appeals his money laundering conviction related to Tornado Cash.
source: https://decrypt.co/304723/tornado-cash-developer-alexey-perstev-leaving-prison

data.title: Nillion: NIL token airdrop registration window has closed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Privacy and security computing network Nillion announced that the registration window for NIL token airdrops has closed. After the mainnet goes online, participants' NIL tokens will be deposited into their claim wallets. Failure to register in time will result in the loss of Nillion airdrop eligibility. Nillion has allocated up to 75,000,000 tokens (7.5% of the total supply) to its community members and early builders.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Economic Impact Soars to $3.2 Trillion in 2024
data.description:
Bitcoin has experienced a significant surge in user engagement throughout 2024, with on-chain data revealing a remarkable $8.7 billion in average daily transaction volume.
The post Bitcoin’s Economic Impact Soars to $3.2 Trillion in 2024 appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/bitcoins-economic-impact-soars-to-3-2-trillion-in-2024/
